back_translation: For the choirmaster. A psalm of David.
In You, O LORD, I take refuge; let me never be put to shame; deliver me in Your righteousness.
Give ear to me quickly; rescue me; be my rock of refuge, a strong fortress to save me.
For You are my rock and my fortress; for Your name's sake lead me and guide me.
Free me from the net they have hidden for me, for You are my strong refuge.
Into Your hand I commit my spirit; You have redeemed me, O LORD, God of truth.
I hate those who cling to worthless idols, but I trust in the LORD.
I will be glad and rejoice in Your steadfast love, for You have seen my affliction; You have known the distress of my soul.
You have not handed me over into the hand of the enemy; You have set my feet in a broad place.
Be merciful to me, O LORD, for I am in distress; my eyes fail with sorrow, my soul and my body as well.
For my life is consumed with grief and my years with groaning; my strength fails because of my iniquity, and my bones waste away.
I have become a reproach to all my enemies, especially to my neighbors, and an object of dread to my acquaintances; those who see me in the street flee from me.
I am forgotten like a dead man, out of mind; I have become like a broken vessel.
For I hear the slander of many; terror is on every side; when they conspire together against me, they plot to take my life.
But I trust in You, O LORD; I say, 'You are my God.'
Deliver me from the hand of my enemies and from those who pursue me, for all my times are in Your hand.
Let Your face shine on Your servant; save me by Your steadfast love.
O LORD, let me not be put to shame, for I have called on You; let the wicked be put to shame; let them be silent in Sheol.
Let the lying lips be silenced—lips that speak arrogantly against the righteous, with pride and contempt.
How great is Your goodness, which You have stored up for those who fear You, and which You have done for those who take refuge in You, before the sons of men!
You conceal them in Your shelter from the strife of tongues; You hide them in the secret of Your presence from the schemes of men.
Blessed be the LORD, for He has shown me His wondrous steadfast love in a besieged city.
As for me, I said in my alarm, 'I am cut off from before Your eyes.' But You heard the voice of my supplications when I cried to You for help.
Love the LORD, all you His faithful ones; the LORD preserves the faithful, but fully repays the one who acts in pride.
Be strong and let your heart take courage, all you who hope in the LORD.
